content.en:
Winter Night Fortress, the commander of the Underworld dwelling.

He received a challenge from Ye Tian, if any supreme realm challenged him, he would naturally not manage money, but this was a challenge certified by the Winter Night Fortress, and he had to accept it.

Of course, he can also choose to throw in the towel.

With his status, if he admits defeat and spreads it, wouldn't he be too embarrassed?

As a sevenfold supreme Dao realm powerhouse, he directly agreed.

Fighting was not allowed inside the East China Sea Fortress, so Ye Tian and Ying Tu came to the outside of the East China Sea Fortress, but in the internal area, there was no danger.

"Fivefold Supreme Dao Realm!"

Immortal Tu sensed Ye Tian's cultivation and was stunned for a moment.

He thought that he was challenged by a sevenfold supreme realm, but it turned out that it was only a fivefold supreme realm.

"Unless it's a strong man who takes the path of the strongest to the best!"

Meditation thought to himself.

So, he restrained his contemptuous thoughts, and if he was really such a bereaving genius, he really paid attention.

Although he comprehended the seventh sequence of supreme dao rules to the ten-percent realm, his own foundation was not strong.

At this moment, many Dao Realms were paying attention to this battle, and even Su Ya had a trace of will to observe this battle.

"Let's shoot!"

Stygian said.

I saw Ye Tian wave his hand, and he suppressed the Immortal Diagram in an instant.

Click!

The bones of the Stygian are shattered and he cannot move.

"Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules!"

He was dumbfounded.

Ye Tian is so demonic, how can he fight this?

"Throw in the towel!"

Stygian shouted.

Immediately, Ye Tian challenged the other two commanders, both of whom won easily.

In this way, Ye Tian became a commander of the Winter Night Fortress, and his status was still above that of other commanders, just because his strength far surpassed that of other commanders.

It's just that he has no status, and the commander is currently his highest position.

this day.

Su Ya summoned Ye Tian.

Ye Tian soon came to Su Ya's residence.

"I've seen the Su Domain Lord!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

Su Ya glanced at Ye Tian, and her eyes suddenly appeared with endless light, and there was even a sixth sequence of supreme dao rules permeating.

This is a sixth-sequence supreme supernatural power, not a combat type, but a snooping supernatural ability of the auxiliary type.

Just now, she was spying on Ye Tian's origin.

Although Ye Tian sensed it, he couldn't stop it, after all, Su Ya's cultivation was much higher than him.

"Your origin is unexpectedly intact!" Su Ya was surprised, "I saw that your sixth sequence to the Dao rule realm was very high, plus you exchanged a lot of Purple Ruin Devouring Stones, thinking that you relied on refining the Purple Ruin Devouring Stone to comprehend the sixth sequence of Dao rules." Some demonic geniuses who could not break through the Sixfold Supreme Dao Realm in the Endless Dao Era and took the path of the Strongest Dao chose to refine the Purple Ruins Devouring Stone because they couldn't comprehend the rules of the Sixth Sequence of the Supreme Dao, and as a result, they stayed in the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm for the rest of their lives, and even stayed in the early or middle stages of the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm. I thought you were the same, but I didn't expect you to rely on your own comprehension of the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules. "

"Lord Su Domain, is this the thing you are looking for me?"

Ye Tian asked.

He didn't show dissatisfaction, and when his strength was lower than others, he had to keep a low profile.

"Naturally this is not the case!" Su Ya smiled: "I have taken a fancy to your strength, my force has discovered a strange land, which contains a strange thing containing the rules of the fifth sequence of the Supreme Dao, the strength is comparable to the weaker Ninefold Dao Realm, but only the Sixfold Dao Realm is allowed to enter."

It is impossible for the Sixfold Supreme Dao Realm to defeat the Ninefold Dao Realm's Supreme Dao Realm, even if it is the Sixfold Dao Realm that has taken the path of the Strongest Dao Realm.

However, we can suppress the strength of the Supreme Dao Strange Thing at the level of the Eightfold Supreme Dao Realm, and then send a group of Sixfold Peak Dao Realm who have taken the path of the Supreme Dao to the Dao Realm, and besiege that Supreme Dao Strange Object, and we will have the hope of killing the other party.

But at present, there is still a lack of a sixfold supreme realm who has comprehended the rules of the sixth sequence of supreme paths. After all, once you comprehend the rules of the sixth sequence of the Supreme Dao, you will definitely break through to the Sevenfold Dao Realm as soon as possible, and you will no longer be stuck in the Sixfold Supreme Dao Realm.

And you meet the criteria, you are now in the late stage of the Fivefold Highest Dao Realm, if you are given enough resources, it is enough for you to quickly break through to the peak of the Fifth Highest Dao Realm, with your Sixth Sequence to the Dao Rule Realm, it is naturally not difficult to break through to the Sixfold Dao Realm. "

"What about the benefits?"

Ye Tian asked.

"A thousand drops of Heavenly Blood Myeloid will be given to you directly, and you don't need to exchange it. In addition, I can recommend you to become a full member of the Innate Origin Alliance. Su Ya said.

"Full membership of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, what is this?"

Ye Tian asked suspiciously.

Su Ya introduced: "There are too many Innate Origin Domains under the command of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, even if it is an Innate Origin Domain, it is nothing in the eyes of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, and you have only one official member of the Wuji Domain, and that is the Taibai Sword Master."

Ordinary Innate Origin Domain forces could not contact the real upper echelons of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance at all, and could only contact formal members. And a lot of information and intelligence, the Innate Origin Domain can only be obtained from some official members, even if you are cheated by official members, you can't do anything.

A full member has access to the upper echelons of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, has access to a lot of information and resources, and can also go to other fortresses and the Innate Origin Domain at will, without restrictions. "

"There is no restriction on going to other fortresses or the Innate Origin Domain?" Ye Tian was very interested in this.

When he went to the Heavenly Dragon Domain before, he needed to apply for it from Taisu Palace, and he couldn't go there privately.

If he could casually go to other Innate Origin Domains and fortresses, he would have already wandered around looking for opportunities.

Unfortunately, he doesn't have that qualification.

But once he became an official member of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, he had this qualification.

But it can also be seen that the Innate Origin Domain Alliance does not value anything other than the official members.

"Okay, I promise!"

Ye Tian said.

"Sign the Supreme Dao Rules Agreement!"

Su Ya said.

Immediately, they signed an agreement.

Not long after, Su Ya gave Ye Tian a thousand drops of Heavenly Blood Cynthalm, even if he became a commander, it was impossible to easily exchange so much Heavenly Blood Cynthal.

But now that Su Ya has given it to him directly, it can be seen how huge Su Ya and the forces behind it are.

This is still the price paid by only recruiting him, and the sixfold supreme realm recruited by the forces behind Su Ya to take the path of the strongest to the Dao is quite a lot, and the price paid can be imagined how much.

But everything is worth it, once you kill that Supreme Dao Strange Thing, you can obtain an item that contains the rules of the Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao, which is enough for Su Ya to break through to the Eightfold Supreme Dao Realm and become the Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm.

Su Ya is not an ordinary eightfold Dao realm, once she breaks through, how terrifying her strength will be!

Therefore, Su Ya and the forces behind it have made a lot of money!

But that strange place was found by the forces behind Su Ya, and other forces could not participate.

"With this thousand drops of Heavenly Blood Essence, my cultivation should be able to break through to the peak of the Fifth Rank Dao Realm very quickly!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

After he went back, he used this thousand drops of Heavenly Blood Essence to improve his cultivation.
